/usr/bin/c++ -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ CMakeFiles/mcp_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcp_server.dir/src/server/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcp_server.dir/src/transport/StdioTransport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcp_server.dir/src/transport/HttpStreamTransport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcp_server.dir/src/transport/SseTransport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcp_server.dir/src/loader/PluginsLoader.cpp.o -o mcp_server
